name: Improper Neutralization of CRLF Sequences ('CRLF Injection')
description: The product does not properly neutralize CRLF (carriage return, line feed) characters in user input before using it in line-delimited data structures like HTTP headers or log entries, allowing attackers to inject new lines and manipulate the output structure.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing \r\n sequences that flows to EGRESS[http_headers] or STORAGE[log_file] or other line-delimited output without a TRANSFORM[crlf_strip] node that removes or encodes CR/LF characters
